channel.title: ROCKos - Operating System Updates
channel.description: Latest release notes and updates for ROCKos.

item.title: ROCKos v1.2 Official Release
item.description: ROCKos v1.2 is now live! Featuring updated ISO builds for both x64 (Ubuntu LTS base) and ARM64 (Debian base) with enhanced performance, UI refinements, and dedicated community forum integration.

item.title: ROCKos v1.1 Official Release
item.description: ROCKos v1.1 is live with updated ISO builds for both x64 (Ubuntu LTS base) and ARM64 (Debian base).

item.title: ROCKos Release Updates (x64 Ubuntu & ARM64 Debian)
item.description: The latest builds of ROCKos are available. x64 architecture is built on Ubuntu LTS, while ARM64 is built on Debian for maximum efficiency and stability on ARM devices and virtual machines.
